channel.title: Cybersecurity Projects on My Cybersecurity Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Cybersecurity Projects on My Cybersecurity Portfolio

item.title: OWASP Juice Shop Penetration Test
item.description:
Scenario

A growing online retail company engaged a cybersecurity consultancy to assess the security of its public-facing e-commerce application before a major product launch. Management was concerned that vulnerabilities within the application could expose customer information, disrupt operations, or damage the company’s reputation.

As a Junior Penetration Tester, I was tasked with conducting a manual and tool-assisted penetration test against the web application. The assessment focused on identifying vulnerabilities related to authentication, authorization, input validation, and sensitive data exposure. The goal was to simulate realistic attacker techniques, validate security weaknesses, assess business risk, and provide actionable remediation recommendations.

item.title: HealthSecure Incident Response Investigation
item.description:
Scenario

HealthSecure Systems, a healthcare technology provider responsible for managing sensitive patient information, detected unusual activity within its network environment. Security analysts observed suspicious authentication events, network anomalies, and alerts generated by intrusion detection systems, raising concerns about a potential compromise.

As part of the Incident Response team, I was tasked with investigating the suspected security incident. Multiple evidence sources were provided, including Windows Event Logs, Zeek network records, Snort IDS alerts, phishing email artifacts, and forensic findings. My objective was to determine how the attack occurred, identify affected systems, reconstruct the attack timeline, and recommend containment and recovery actions.

item.title: Acme AeroTech Network Security Assessment
item.description:
Scenario

Acme AeroTech is a mid-sized aerospace manufacturing company with approximately 75 employees operating across engineering, administration, production, and management departments. As the organization expanded, concerns emerged regarding network security, unauthorized access risks, and insufficient segmentation between critical systems.

I was engaged as a Security Consultant to perform a comprehensive network security assessment and provide recommendations to strengthen the organization’s security posture. The engagement involved reviewing the existing network architecture, identifying vulnerabilities and operational risks, evaluating access control mechanisms, and proposing a secure redesign aligned with industry best practices.

item.title: Python Port Scanner
item.description:
Scenario

Security analysts frequently require rapid visibility into open services and exposed network ports when conducting asset discovery, vulnerability assessments, and security investigations. Manual enumeration can be time-consuming, particularly when assessing multiple hosts across a network.

To address this challenge, I designed and developed a multi-threaded Python Port Scanner capable of identifying open TCP ports and active services across target systems. The objective was to strengthen my understanding of network protocols, socket programming, and security automation while creating a practical tool that could support network reconnaissance activities.

item.title: Log Monitoring Script
item.description:
Scenario

Modern organizations generate significant volumes of system and security logs, making it difficult for administrators to manually review events and identify suspicious activity in a timely manner. Delayed detection can allow threats to persist unnoticed within an environment.

To improve visibility and automate monitoring processes, I developed a Log Monitoring utility designed to analyze log files and identify indicators of potentially malicious activity. The tool was created to support early detection of suspicious events such as failed authentication attempts, unauthorized access attempts, and unusual system behavior.

item.title: Secure Password Generator
item.description:
Scenario

Weak passwords remain one of the most common causes of account compromise and unauthorized access. Many users continue to rely on predictable passwords that can be easily guessed, reused across multiple services, or cracked through brute-force attacks.

To promote stronger authentication practices and deepen my understanding of secure randomization techniques, I developed a Secure Password Generator using Python. The application generates complex passwords based on configurable security requirements, including password length, character diversity, and randomness.
